'''Landric''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed [[Emmo sector/Legends|Emmo sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
During a vacation on the resort world of [[Elshandruu Pica]], the [[Corusca gem/Legends|corusca gem]] necklace that belonged to Moff Landric's wife was stolen, then returned, by the infamous art and jewelry thief known only as "[[Tanda Marelle|Tombat]]." The Moff ordered the [[Imperial Office of Criminal Investigations/Legends|Imperial Office of Criminal Investigations]] to immediately capture the criminal, though they believed Tombat to be male.

{{Char-stub}}
